name: 03_cand_2_bb_rsi_mean_reversion_gold_m15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, extreme price excursions outside Bollinger Bands combined with extreme RSI readings revert toward the mean often enough to produce PF>2 when filtered by BB-width percentile and active sessions.

entry_rules.long: close < lower_bb AND rsi(7) < 12 AND regime_filter passes
entry_rules.short: close > upper_bb AND rsi(7) > 88 AND regime_filter passes

exit_rules.take_profit: middle BB (SMA20) - partial reversion target, more realistic than opposite band
exit_rules.early_exit: Close on touch of opposite BB if reached first
